title: Longer Following Time
description: Animals will follow you even after switching the item in your hand, for a configurable amount of time (in case you need to fight off an enemy or use a certain item to open a door, etc.)
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME/MP_LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME_Header.webp) Now animals, such as cows, sheep, pigs or other animals that can be fed will follow you even after switching the item in your hand, for a configurable amount of time (in case you need to fight off an enemy or use a certain item to open a door, etc. Of course, the time is configurable, although by default it will be 4 seconds. That is, if you have in your hand, for example, wheat, and you change it for a sword, the cows will follow you for 4 seconds. When the time passes, the cows will stop following you. This will be easy to modify in the configuration file. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME/MP_LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME_Summary.webp) Have you ever happened that you are moving your cows and you have to open a door, or you are attacked by a zombie? Don't worry, because now you will have a few seconds, in which you can change your hand item, and the animals will follow you wherever you go. It's as if they have a memory! In addition, the time is completely configurable, although by default, we have only set 4 seconds, which is a reasonable time and will save you a lot of trouble. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME/MP_LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME/MP_LONGER_FOLLOWING_TIME_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aQBO03zj/images/78cd46f903a227ec217d0309a066cc4d2fcee84a.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aQBO03zj/images/84ba8234b79e2d87aa32deae6ee6585380ff26b9.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aQBO03zj/images/eef01f76d7b3b8f487f13d439df284e3c81e3437.jpeg) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aQBO03zj/images/744526d2c11491d3ad9a6ca3051b37e7a0afab16.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
